parameters.query:
SELECT 
    jo.joborder_id,
    jo.joborder_number,
    jo.joborder_type,
    jo.order_number,
    jo.phase,
    jo.status,
    jo.createtime,
    jo.product_quantity,
    jo.printinfobox_id,
    u.user_name AS user_name,
    p1.print_name AS printinfo_name,
    p2.print_name AS printinfobox_name,
    pinfo2.product_code,
    pinfo2.product_model_id,
    pl.procedure_list_name,
    jo.printinfo_id,
    jo.product_id,
    jo.procedure_list_id
FROM 
    mes.joborder jo
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.sys_user u ON jo.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.printinfo p1 ON jo.printinfo_id = p1.printinfo_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.printinfo p2 ON jo.printinfobox_id = p2.printinfo_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.product_info pinfo2 ON jo.product_id = pinfo2.product_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.procedure_list pl ON jo.procedure_list_id = pl.procedure_list_id
WHERE 
     jo.status = '1'
and  jo.joborder_type='Return'

SELECT 
    jo.joborder_id,
    jo.joborder_number,
    jo.joborder_type,
    jo.order_number,
    jo.phase,
    jo.status,
    jo.createtime,
    jo.product_quantity,
    jo.printinfobox_id,
    u.user_name AS user_name,
    p1.print_name AS printinfo_name,
    p2.print_name AS printinfobox_name,
    pinfo2.product_code,
    pinfo2.product_model_id,
    pl.procedure_list_name,
    jo.printinfo_id,
    jo.product_id,
    jo.procedure_list_id
FROM 
    mes.joborder jo
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.sys_user u ON jo.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.printinfo p1 ON jo.printinfo_id = p1.printinfo_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.printinfo p2 ON jo.printinfobox_id = p2.printinfo_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.product_info pinfo2 ON jo.product_id = pinfo2.product_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.procedure_list pl ON jo.procedure_list_id = pl.procedure_list_id
WHERE 
     jo.status = '1';

SELECT 
    jo.joborder_id,
    jo.joborder_number,
    jo.joborder_type,
    jo.order_number,
    jo.phase,
    jo.status,
    jo.createtime,
    jo.product_quantity,
    jo.printinfobox_id,
    u.user_name AS user_name,
    p1.print_name AS printinfo_name,
    p2.print_name AS printinfobox_name,
    pinfo2.product_code,
    pinfo2.product_model_id,
    pl.procedure_list_name,
    jo.printinfo_id,
    jo.product_id,
    jo.procedure_list_id
FROM 
    mes.joborder jo
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.sys_user u ON jo.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.printinfo p1 ON jo.printinfo_id = p1.printinfo_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.printinfo p2 ON jo.printinfobox_id = p2.printinfo_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.product_info pinfo2 ON jo.product_id = pinfo2.product_id
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.procedure_list pl ON jo.procedure_list_id = pl.procedure_list_id
WHERE 
    jo.status = '1'
and jo.joborder_number ='{{ $json.query.joborder_number }}';
